---
title: "style.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\calculus\style.ts"
loc: 31
complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.70
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 5.85
---

## Intent
The `style.ts` module implements the 'Style Sensor' (S), focusing on structural symmetry and naming purity. It calculates scores based on identifier naming conventions (camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case), line length variance (Birkhoff symmetry), and UI-specific structural bonuses.

## Interaction Protocol
Invoke the `calculateStyleScore` function with the raw source code. The function analyzes the text and returns a style score that represents the aesthetic and idiomatic harmony of the code.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `calculateStyleScore`
- `calculateStyleScore`
- `lines`
- `lengths`
- `avgLength`
- `variance`
- `stdDev`
- `symmetryScore`
- `identifiers`
- `validIdentifiers`
- `purityRatio`
- `purityScore`
- `claustrophobicPenalty`
- `blockCount`
- `uiOrderBonus`
- `adhoc`
- `baseScore`
- `finalScore`
